p.c: exists(k0: A) { compose_add_group_hom[A, B, C](g, h).hom(k0) != compose[A, B, C](g.hom, h.hom, k0) }
let w0: A satisfy { compose_add_group_hom[A, B, C](g, h).hom(w0) != compose[A, B, C](g.hom, h.hom, w0) }

function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup, T2: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T1, T2], x1: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_add_group_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[A, B, C](g, h, w0)

goal: rhs.hom = compose[A, C, D](f.hom, compose[A, B, C](g.hom, h.hom))

p.c: function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x1: AddGroupHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[A, D](rhs, lhs)
exists(k0: A) { lhs.hom(k0) != compose[A, B, B](identity_add_group_hom[B].hom, f.hom, k0) }
let w0: A satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[A, B, B](identity_add_group_hom[B].hom, f.hom, w0) }

function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup, T2: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T1, T2], x1: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_add_group_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[A, B, B](identity_add_group_hom[B], f, w0)
function[T0: AddGroup] { Option.some[AddGroupHom[T0, T0]](identity_add_group_hom[T0]) = AddGroupHom.new[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[B]
exists(k0: B) { identity_fn(k0) != identity_add_group_hom[B].hom(k0) }
let w0: B satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_add_group_hom[B].hom(w0) }

function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[AddGroupHom[T0, T1]](x0) != AddGroupHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[B, B](identity_add_group_hom[B], identity_fn[B], w0)
function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x1: AddGroupHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[A, B](compose_add_group_hom[A, B, B](identity_add_group_hom[B], f), f)
exists(k0: A) { lhs.hom(k0) != compose[A, A, B](f.hom, identity_add_group_hom[A].hom, k0) }
let w0: A satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[A, A, B](f.hom, identity_add_group_hom[A].hom, w0) }

function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup, T2: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T1, T2], x1: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_add_group_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[A, A, B](f, identity_add_group_hom[A], w0)
function[T0: AddGroup] { Option.some[AddGroupHom[T0, T0]](identity_add_group_hom[T0]) = AddGroupHom.new[T0, T0](identity_fn[T0]) }[A]
exists(k0: A) { identity_fn(k0) != identity_add_group_hom[A].hom(k0) }
let w0: A satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_add_group_hom[A].hom(w0) }

function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[AddGroupHom[T0, T1]](x0) != AddGroupHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[A, A](identity_add_group_hom[A], identity_fn[A], w0)
function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T0, T1], x1: AddGroupHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[A, B](compose_add_group_hom[A, A, B](f, identity_add_group_hom[A]), f)
